sections.markdown:
- Activity: Tempo Thursdays
- Started: 2025-07-24 17:41
- Distance: 8.4 km
- Moving time: 43:54
- Elapsed time: 44:02
- Elevation gain: 182.4 m
- Average heart rate: 166.1 bpm
- Max heart rate: 181 bpm
- Average watts: 240.5 W
- Average speed: 11.5 km/h

- Apple Health recorded `4` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `170.0 bpm`, ranging from `155.8` to `179.0 bpm`.
- First-half average HR was `162.9 bpm` and second-half average HR was `177.2 bpm` (+14.3 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `172.6 spm`, with a working range of `100.0` to `185.8 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `181.2 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `167.5 spm` (-13.7 spm), which suggests some late turnover fade.

- Strava moving pace averaged `5:13 /km` across `8.427 km` in `43:54` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `5:19 /km` and second-half pace was `5:07 /km` (-12 s/km), so pace picked up through the second half.

- Strava summary HR came in at `166.1 bpm` average and `181 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `158.6 bpm` in the first half and `173.5 bpm` in the second (+14.9 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Moving time was `43:54` out of `44:02` elapsed (99.7%), which kept stoppage cost negligible.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `6` stop segments and `0.6%` stationary samples, so the run was mostly continuous with a few interruptions.

- Strava logged about `191.0 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `35.2 m` and `66.0 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `95.8 m` in the first half and `95.2 m` in the second, so the climbing load was split fairly evenly.
